notes: Tiny 2-theorem file providing the Kähler-derivation inverse rule (D_inv_smul) and quotient rule (D_mul_inv_smul) for the function field of an elliptic curve; no sorries, no heartbeat overrides. Both proofs are trivial compositions of Derivation.leibniz and mul_inv_cancel₀. Standard calculus identities that could plausibly already exist in Mathlib for general derivations (suspected mild Mathlib overlap).
